name: Geralt of Rivia
description:
𝗠𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗳𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗼𝗺 𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 [𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩]

𝗪𝗶𝘁𝗰𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗮𝗱𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗥𝗣𝗚

Go on an adventure with Geralt of Rivia. This scenario is prompted to lead into an interactive RP story where you and Geralt go on a monster hunting adventure together. It will attempt to follow your lead in the story and invent details as much as it can to continue it.

The story is open to NSFW content for both violence and sexual interaction, though that's not the primary focus of the prompt. Witchers do like sex though, so it's easily achievable.

I've tried to capture the vibe of both Andrzej Sapkowski's stories and the Witcher games, so that it generates stories in a similar style. Hopefully it feels like a proper Witcher adventure.
creator: Michaelk
